audit_result.proof_trace: The main gossip path correctly enforces slot > parent.slot at L504 via verify_slot_higher_than_parent. However, new_for_block_publishing (L221-250) bypasses this check, only calling verify_data_column_sidecar (structural checks) and verify_is_unknown_sidecar (deduplication). If locally-constructed columns have invalid slot relationships, they propagate as GossipVerifiedDataColumn without validation.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Local block construction bug or external data source provides sidecar with slot <= parent.slot. Call new_for_block_publishing, which accepts it without slot validation. Result is GossipVerifiedDataColumn that propagates invalid data over network, wasting bandwidth and triggering peer penalties.

PROP-6a4369e9-pre-005.text: Gossip validation must reject sidecar whose slot is not higher than parent block slot.
